summary: Iteration 109 - Homepage split testing complete. Homepage now slimmed down (~3036px scroll height) with hero, trust bar, 4 feature cards, 3 live products, and final CTA. New /features page created with all detailed content (core capabilities, UK section, 7-signal methodology, 6 use cases, free tools, CTA). Navigation updated with 'Features' as first top-level link. All 22 tests passed.
passed_tests: Homepage (/) loads with hero section, dashboard mockup image, trust bar
Homepage has 4 feature highlight cards (Trend Detection, Competition Analysis, UK Viability Scoring, AI Launch Decisions)
Homepage 'See all features' button links to /features
Homepage shows 3 live trending products from API (not 6 as before)
Homepage has final CTA section with Start Free and See Pricing buttons
Homepage scroll height is ~3036px (significantly shorter than before)
Features page (/features) loads with header section
Features page has core capabilities section with analysis image
Features page has UK section with map visual and 6 feature badges
Features page has methodology section with 7 signal scoring bars
Features page has use cases section with 6 cards
Features page has free tools section with trending visual image
Features page has CTA section with Start Free and See Pricing buttons
Navigation bar shows 'Features' as first top-level link
Features link in nav is highlighted (text-indigo-600) when on /features page
All 4 AI-generated images load correctly (hero dashboard, analysis, UK map, trending)
Hero primary CTA navigates to /signup
Hero secondary CTA navigates to /trending-products
Final CTA primary navigates to /signup
Final CTA secondary navigates to /pricing
Both pages are responsive on mobile (390x844)
Mobile menu toggle works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Homepage correctly slimmed down - removed How It Works, UK section, use cases, methodology, free tools sections
Homepage now fetches only 3 products instead of 6 (limit=3 in API call)
FeaturesPage.jsx correctly contains all detailed content moved from homepage
NAV_ITEMS in LandingLayout.jsx correctly has 'Features' as first item
Features nav link correctly uses location.pathname === item.href for active state styling
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Lazy loading implemented for FeaturesPage (line 16 in App.js)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 109 verified the homepage split: slim homepage (~3036px) with hero, trust bar, 4 feature cards, 3 products, final CTA. New /features page (~5223px) contains all detailed content. Navigation has 'Features' as first link with active state highlighting. All images load, all CTAs navigate correctly, mobile responsive. One 403 console error from external resource (not app-related).
